channel.title: Yellow-Matrix on Dyson Sphere Program Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Yellow-Matrix on Dyson Sphere Program Guide

item.title: How to Fix DSP Yellow Matrix Research Slowdown After Tech Unlock
item.description:
You researched Titanium Alloy Smelting. Yellow matrices stopped. You researched Interstellar Logistics. Yellow matrices stopped again. Your research lab is consuming matrices but production is stalled. This isn't a bug — it's a buffer collapse, and it is fixable in 5 minutes. If you are still bringing titanium in by hand, our Titanium Transport Guide covers setting up an automated ore supply before scaling yellow science.

TL;DR — The Fix:
Yellow matrix slowdown after tech unlock is caused by your production buffers running dry while new tech consumes the same materials. The fix is to add buffer storage between each production step and increase production of the bottleneck ingredient.
Quick check: Open your production stats (P key). Check which yellow matrix ingredient is empty. That's your bottleneck.

The Buffer Collapse: How It Works

Here is what actually happens when you research a big tech and your yellow science stops:
